PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Venue Evidentiary Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-15-2012 Continued To Jul-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Romona Fisher Burns (Objector). Milla Lvovich for and with Annie Marsh (Petitioner). Kendall Fletcher (Associate for Ms. Lvovich).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to proper venue. Mr. Burns died in South San Francisco. Ms. Lvovich will file an Amended Petition to correct defects in the Petition filed by Mrs. Marsh in Pro Per. The Evidentiary Hearing on Venue is set on June 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to July 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court and Counsel will research if the Amended Petiiton should be filed prior to the evidentiary hearing.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Denied
